title: Project Audit & Cleanup: advanced-homeassistant-mcp
description: Comprehensive audit-driven cleanup of the advanced-homeassistant-mcp project. Addresses 138 issues across 5 phases: critical security/install fixes, dead code removal, dependency cleanup, build/CI optimization, and bug fixes.

phases.name: Critical: Security & Broken Install
phases.summary: Fix Dockerfile CMD, revoke committed JWT, fix package.json main, fix docker-compose

phases.name: Dead Code Removal
phases.summary: Delete dead source files, dead test files, dead bin/ artifacts, dead scripts, stale dist dirs

phases.name: Dependency Cleanup
phases.summary: Remove 12+ unused deps, move mis-categorized ones, update esbuild external list

phases.name: Build & CI Optimization
phases.summary: Add minify/sourcemap, fix tsconfig, update AGENTS.md, version constants, drop package-lock

phases.name: Bug Fixes
phases.summary: WebSocket leaks, JWT defaults, MCPServer singleton, MCPResponse id null, SSE shutdown, console.log

exit_criteria: All 5 phases complete with subtasks marked completed
bun x tsc --noEmit passes with zero new errors
Dockerfile CMD is correct (image boots successfully)
